query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, leadType, COUNT(CASE WHEN leadType = 'ready' THEN 1 END) as ready, COUNT(CASE WHEN leadType = 'launch' THEN 1 END) as launch FROM properfyLeads GROUP BY leadType;
